title: Crunchy Mediterranean Olives Flatbread
description: A buttery, crunchy flatbread bursting with black olives, dill pickles, and Mediterranean herbs—Whole30‑friendly and perfect for a festive snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and line an 8‑inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together almond flour, ground flaxseed, sea salt, and garlic powder.
Add the eggs and 2 tbsp olive oil; stir until a cohesive dough forms.
Press the dough into the prepared pan, creating an even 1/2-inch crust.
Bake for 10 minutes until lightly golden.
Remove from the oven, brush the crust with the remaining tbsp of olive oil, then scatter chopped black olives, diced dill pickles, oregano, and basil over the surface.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes until the toppings are heated through and the crust is crisp.
Let the flatbread cool for 5 minutes, then cut into 4 wedges and serve warm.
